description.value:
Puppet Masters spend a lot of their time researching and preparing, not just for crafting their puppets, but to prepare for all kinds of situations.

Also at 5th level, you add half your Proficiency Bonus to all skill checks that you aren't proficient in, and you can take the Help action as a Bonus Action.

When you take the Help action to assist an ally in attacking a creature (your Puppet Tool counts as an allied creature), the target of the attack can be within 30 feet, instead of 5 feet, provided your ally can see and hear you.

macro.name: Generalized Skill
macro.author: R0hw7EUsG7OzIhgn
